zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel Mabella Hawkset於大約1290年出生在英國爾斯托雷頓時，她的父親James Hawkset II18歲，母親Mrs James Hawkset19歲。她於大約1311年與Sir John de Stanley在英國爾斯托雷頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1345年在英國爾享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel Mabella Hawkset于大约1290年出生在英国爾斯托雷頓时，她的父亲James Hawkset II18岁，母亲Mrs James Hawkset19岁。她于大约1311年与Sir John de Stanley在英国爾斯托雷頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1345年在英国爾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hawkset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: nickname from Middle English haukeseye ‘hawk’s eye’.
2 English: the Manchester surname Hawksey preserves an old form of Hawkshaw , recorded as Hawkesey in 1527 ( Lancs Place-Names , p. 63).

variants.name: Hawkshaw
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Hawkshaw in Tottington (Lancashire), named from Old English hafoc ‘hawk’ + sceaga ‘small wood, copse’.

variants.name: Lancs Place-Names
meanings: 1 Norman, English: (i) locative name from any of the five places in Normandy named Beaumont (Old French ‘beautiful hill or mound’). The Domesday Book family came from Beaumont-le-Roger (Eure). (ii) locative name; the Suffolk name may alternatively derive from Beaumont cum Moze (Essex), a Norman re-naming of a place formerly known as Fulepet ‘foul hollow’, in imitation of one of the places mentioned in (i). It is recorded as Bealmont (1175–80) and Beumund (1328) in Place-Names of Essex .

2 Norman, English: locative name the Lancs and WR Yorks name is from Beaumont (Lancs), named in imitation of one of the Norman places mentioned in (1). It is recorded as Belli Montis (1190), Belmunt (1212), (de) Beaumont in the 13th century, and Beamond (about 1320) in Lancs Place-Names .

variants.name: Hawkey
meanings: English (Cornwall): variant, with loss of the medial genitive s, of Hawksey, which is a nickname from Middle English haukeseye ‘hawk's eye’ and also a variant of Hawkshaw , recorded as Hawkesey in 1527.

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

nameMeanings.name: Mabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern name, apparently derived from   Isabella   by the dropping of the initial vowel.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel Mabella Hawkset was born about 1290, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, her father, James Hawkset II, was 18 and her mother, Mrs James Hawkset, was 19. She married Sir John de Stanley about 1311, in Storeton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1345, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel Mabella Hawkset est née environ 1290, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, James Hawkset II, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mrs James Hawkset, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Stanley environ 1311, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1345, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel Mabella Hawkset um 1290 in Storeton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Hawkset II 18 und ihre Mutter Mrs James Hawkset 19. Sie hat um 1311 in Storeton, Cheshire, England Sir John de Stanley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1345 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel Mabella Hawkset è nata il circa 1290 nel Storeton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, James Hawkset II, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Mrs James Hawkset, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Stanley circa 1311, nel Storeton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1345, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel Mabella Hawksetが約1290年にイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンで生まれた時，父James Hawkset IIは18歳，母Mrs James Hawksetは19歳であった。約1311年にイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンでSir John de Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1345年にイギリスチェシュアイアで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel Mabella Hawkset(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 체실르 스토레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Hawkset II(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs James Hawkset(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1311년 영국 체실르 스토레턴에서 Sir John de Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 영국 체실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John de Stanley aproximadamente 1311, em Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1345, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel Mabella Hawkset родилась около 1290 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени James Hawkset II было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs James Hawkset, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Stanley около 1311 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1345 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel Mabella Hawkset nació aproximadamente 1290, en Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Hawkset II, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mrs James Hawkset, tenía 19 años.
